_meta.corpus: DEMO — Relay Field Systems sample data
_meta.note: Entirely fictional company for demo mode. Must never be cited for real questionnaires.
_meta.generated_from: TrustDeck Onboarding Interview v2, Tier 1 (Q1–Q20) — owner-confirmed answers

Company.summary: Relay Field Systems, Inc. (Delaware C-corp) — B2B SaaS work-order dispatch & technician scheduling for mid-market trade contractors (HVAC, electrical, plumbing). 85 employees. Hybrid — Denver HQ, ~60% remote.

Compliance.summary: SOC 2 Type II — report issued 2026-02, covering 2025-01 through 2025-12; one exception (change-management evidence gap) remediated Q3 2025. ISO 27001 not held — certification targeted 2027. No HIPAA/PCI scope.

Encryption.summary: AES-256 at rest (Azure Storage encryption / SQL TDE); keys in Azure Key Vault with annual automatic rotation. TLS 1.2 minimum, TLS 1.3 preferred, HSTS on all public endpoints. CMK/BYOK supported on the Enterprise tier via customer-held Azure Key Vault.

Access Control.summary: SSO via Microsoft Entra ID with MFA enforced for all employees and contractors; FIDO2 keys required for admins. RBAC on least privilege. Access reviews quarterly (privileged roles monthly). Offboarding revocation within 8 business hours via Entra lifecycle workflows.

AppSec.summary: Annual pen test — most recent 2026-01 by Kestrel Security: no criticals; one high (SSRF in webhook handler) remediated in 21 days, retest confirmed. Code review required on every PR (2 approvers for production services). GitHub Advanced Security: CodeQL SAST, secret scanning, Dependabot SCA — all blocking. Remediation SLAs: critical 7 days / high 30 / medium 90.

Logging.summary: Application and platform logs to Azure Monitor; Microsoft Sentinel SIEM with analytics rules for auth anomalies and privilege escalation. Retention 13 months. Extended retention per customer request is not documented (gap).

Incident Response.summary: Documented IR plan v3.1 with severity matrix and 24/7 on-call. Customer notification within 72 hours of a confirmed breach involving their data.

BC/DR.summary: Continuous geo-redundant replication plus nightly encrypted backups. RTO 12h / RPO 1h. Last DR failover test 2026-03-19: passed, production restored in Central US in 9h40m. Restore tests quarterly.

HR Security.summary: Background checks on all new hires via Sterling — criminal, identity, employment (US). Annual security awareness training plus quarterly phishing simulations. NDAs for all staff and contractors.

Endpoint.summary: Intune MDM on all devices; BitLocker/FileVault full-disk encryption; Defender for Endpoint EDR fleet-wide.

Vendors.summary: Subprocessors: Microsoft Azure (hosting), Stripe (billing), Twilio (SMS dispatch notifications), HubSpot (CRM/support), Google Workspace (email/docs). DPA with GDPR SCCs available on request.

Privacy.summary: Data processed: work orders, technician schedules, customer site addresses and contacts, usage analytics. No PHI, no cardholder data (payments handled entirely by Stripe), no children's data. Retention: life of contract + 60 days, then purged; deletion on request within 30 days with written confirmation. CCPA via privacy@relayfield.example. DPO appointment not addressed in Tier 1 (gap).

Infrastructure & Network.summary: Hosted on Microsoft Azure — East US 2 primary, Central US for DR. Prod, staging, and dev in separate Azure subscriptions with separate VNets. NSGs default-deny; Azure WAF + DDoS Protection on public endpoints. Production access via Azure Bastion with Entra PIM just-in-time elevation; no standing VPN.

Policies.summary: Written policies: InfoSec Policy v4, Acceptable Use v2, Access Control v3, Encryption Standard v2, IR Plan v3.1, BC/DR Runbook v2, Data Retention v1. Vendor Management Policy exists only as a DRAFT (gap). No clear desk policy (gap).

gaps.detail: Extended log retention beyond 13 months per customer request — not documented.
DPO appointment not addressed in Tier 1 — confirm or assign responsibility.
Vendor Management Policy is a draft only; no clear desk policy.
Cyber liability insurance and indemnification terms — human-only domains, not stored in the Trust Corpus.
